editable.reason: Case reviews are generated by the full browser engine and imported on mobile as read-only stored reviews.

review_tier.label: STL surface only
review_tier.summary: Crown surface geometry only. No roots, bone, periodontal status, or occlusion. Findings are surface-level review aids, not diagnosis.

unresolved_data_gaps.reason: Root geometry and root position are not visible in surface scans.
Alveolar bone boundaries require registered, reviewed CBCT.
Periodontal support and risk are not derivable from crown surfaces.
Dynamic occlusion and contacts require occlusal records.
CBCT-derived anatomy requires registration and human review before use.
